---
title: "In silico data models"
author: "Mikkel Skjoldan Svenningsen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---






```{r define data generating function, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(MASS)
library(LMMstar)
library(mvtnorm)
library(lavaSearch2)
library(nlme)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(compiler)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(ggpubr)
library(here)
rm(list = ls())
source("supporting_functions_public.R")

here::i_am("1_small_samples_F_test.Rmd")


```



```{r run code, include=FALSE}

library(MBESS)

sig_means <- c(1, 1.5, 1.5, 1.5) # 0.35
null_means <- c(1 ,1 ,1, 1)

sig_fraction <- 0.5

n_repeats <- 1000
F_repeats <- 1000


for(i in 1:1000){
  
  print(i)
  
rn <- sample(1:100000,1)

Ns <- c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40)



for(datatype in c("dvar", "dcc")){

  print(datatype)
  
for(N in Ns){
  
  
  if(datatype=="dvar"){
    cc <- 0.5
    cor_matrix <- toeplitz(c(1,cc,cc, cc))
    sds <- seq(1,3,length=4)
    cov_matrix <- cor2cov(cor_matrix, sds)
  }else if(datatype=="dcc"){
    cov_matrix <- toeplitz(c(1,0.8,0.5, 0.2))
  }
  
  print(N)
  
  df_list <- generate_datasets(N, cov_matrix, n_repeats, sig_fraction, sig_means, null_means)

  df_fit <- run_tests_small_sample(df_list, N, cov_matrix, n_repeats, sig_fraction, sig_means, null_means,  F, 0, F_repeats)

  df_rates <- results_to_rates_small_sample(df_fit)
  
  data_path <- here(  "Numerical_data", "small_samples_F_test")

  saveRDS(df_rates, paste0(data_path, "/df_rates_Ftest_", N, "_n_repeats=", n_repeats,"_F_repeats=", F_repeats, "_datatype=",datatype,"_", rn, ".rds"))

}
}
}

```


```{r combined data and plot, include=FALSE}



folder <- here(  "Numerical_data", "small_samples_F_test")


files <- list.files(path = folder)


df_combined <- do.call(rbind, lapply(files, function(file_i){
  
  df_i <- readRDS(paste0(folder,"/", file_i))
  tmp <- strsplit(file_i, "_")[[1]]
  
  data.frame(
    n_sig = as.numeric(df_i$extra_info[2]), 
    n_nsig = as.numeric(df_i$extra_info[3]),
    fpr_un = df_i$fpr_un[5],
    fpr_cs = as.numeric(df_i$fpr_cs[5]),
    fpr_boot = as.numeric(df_i$fpr_un[6]),
    tpr_un = df_i$tpr_un[5],
    tpr_cs = as.numeric(df_i$tpr_cs[5]),
    tpr_boot = as.numeric(df_i$tpr_un[6]),
    n_subjects =  tmp[4],
    repeats =     strsplit(tmp[6], "=")[[1]][2], 
    datatype =    strsplit(tmp[9], "=")[[1]][2]
  )
})) # do.call

df_combined <- na.omit(df_combined)

df_plot <- df_combined %>%
group_by(n_subjects, datatype) %>%
dplyr::summarize(fpr_cs = sum(fpr_cs*n_nsig)/sum(n_nsig), 
          fpr_un = sum(fpr_un*n_nsig)/sum(n_nsig), 
          fpr_boot = sum(fpr_boot*n_nsig)/sum(n_nsig), 
          tpr_cs = sum(tpr_cs*n_sig)/sum(n_sig), 
          tpr_un = sum(tpr_un*n_sig)/sum(n_sig), 
          tpr_boot = sum(tpr_boot*n_sig)/sum(n_sig), 
          ) %>%
          as.data.frame()

df_plot$x <- as.numeric(df_plot$n_subjects)

lop <- list()

for(i in 1:2){
  
  if(i==1){
    label <- "dvar"
    df_plot_i <- df_plot[df_plot$datatype == label, ]
    title1 <- 'Significance level \nIncreasing variance'
    title2 <- 'Power \nIncreasing variance'
  }else{
    label <- "dcc"
    df_plot_i <- df_plot[df_plot$datatype == label, ]
    title1 <- 'Significance level \nDecreasing correlation'
    title2 <- 'Power \nDecreasing correlation'
  }


  
  
lop[[paste0(label, "1")]] <- ggplot(df_plot_i) + 
  geom_line(aes(x=x, y=fpr_cs, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (CS)')) +
  geom_line(aes(x=x, y=fpr_un, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (UN)')) +
  geom_line(aes(x=x, y=fpr_boot, color='Simulation based F-test (UN, LMMstar)')) + 
  geom_point(aes(x=x, y=fpr_cs, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (CS)')) +
  geom_point(aes(x=x, y=fpr_un, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (UN)')) +
  geom_point(aes(x=x, y=fpr_boot, color='Simulation based F-test (UN, LMMstar)')) + 
  theme_bw() + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed") + 
   scale_color_manual( 
     name = "Type of F-test", 
    values = c("Satterthwaite based F-test (UN)" = "blue", 
               "Simulation based F-test (UN, LMMstar)" = "cyan4", 
               "Satterthwaite based F-test (CS)" = "red")) + 
  labs(x="Sample size", y ="False positive rate") + ggtitle( title1 ) + 
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14), 
  panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  axis.line = element_blank(), 
  text = element_text(size = 12)
  )
  

lop[[paste0(label, "2")]] <- ggplot(df_plot_i) + 
  geom_line(aes(x=x, y=tpr_cs, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (CS)')) +
  geom_line(aes(x=x, y=tpr_un, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (UN)')) +
  geom_line(aes(x=x, y=tpr_boot, color='Simulation based F-test (UN, LMMstar)')) + 
  geom_point(aes(x=x, y=tpr_cs, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (CS)')) +
  geom_point(aes(x=x, y=tpr_un, color='Satterthwaite based F-test (UN)')) +
  geom_point(aes(x=x, y=tpr_boot, color='Simulation based F-test (UN, LMMstar)')) + 
  theme_bw() + 

   scale_color_manual( 
     name = "Type of F-test", 
    values = c("Satterthwaite based F-test (UN)" = "blue", 
               "Simulation based F-test (UN, LMMstar)" = "cyan4", 
               "Satterthwaite based F-test (CS)" = "red")) + 
  labs(x="Sample size", y ="True positive rate")+ ggtitle( title2 )+  
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 14), 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14), 
  panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  axis.line = element_blank(), 
  text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

}


g <- ggarrange(lop$dvar1, lop$dvar2, lop$dcc1, lop$dcc2,
               common.legend = TRUE, ncol=4, 
               legend = "bottom")+ theme(panel.border = element_blank())


data_path <- here( "Figures")
ggsave(plot = g, filename= paste0(data_path, "/small_samples_new.pdf"), width=14, height=5)


```
